sections.paragraph:
verb לפקוח

to open (eyes)

verb להיפקח

be opened (eyes) ; to become clever, begin to understand

verb לפקח

to supervise, inspect, overse; make clever, make clear; sober

verb פוקח

be supervised; become clever, become wise

verb לפקח (>>פיקח)

to supervise, inspect, oversee; make clever, make clear; sober

noun

controller, inspector, supervisor, warden

masculine noun and adjective פקח (>>פיקח)

clever, wise, shrewd, smart, bright, brainy, cunning, knowing, witty, politic, prudent, sagacious, vulpine, adroit, artful, astute, cute; sharp eyed
